en: - MORNING ABUELO. (PERCUSSIVE MUSIC) (CHILDREN LAUGHING)
- HEY, WHERE'S MY GIFT AT? - MY COUSIN'S CEREMONY IS TONIGHT.
ko: 야 내 선물은 어딨어? 오늘 밤 내 사촌 의식이 있어.

en: - WHAT'S HIS GIFT? - WE'RE GONNA FIND OUT. - WHAT'S YOUR GIFT?
ko: 걔 선물이 뭐야? 알게 될 거야. 너 선물은 뭔데?

en: - WHO'S ASKING. - US.
- WELL US, I CAN'T JUST TALK ABOUT MYSELF.
I'M ONLY PART OF THE AMAZING MADRIGALS.
ko: 난 대단한 마드리갈 가문의 일부일 뿐이야.

en: - WHO ARE THE AMAZING MADRIGALS? - AH, YOU'RE NOT GONNA LEAVE ME ALONE, ARE YOU?
ko: 대단한 마드리갈이 누군데? 안 놔줄 거지?

en: CASITA, HELP ME OUT, DRAWERS.
FLOORS. DOORS.
LET'S GO. ♪ THIS IS OUR HOME ♪ ♪ WE'VE GOT EVERY GENERATION ♪
♪ SO FULL OF MUSIC, THE RHYTHM OF ITS OWN DESIGN ♪
♪ THIS IS MY FAMILY, A PERFECT CONSTELLATION ♪
♪ SO MANY STARS AND EVERYBODY GETS TO SHINE ♪
♪ WHOA, LET'S BE CLEAR, ABUELA RUNS THIS SHOW ♪
♪ WHOA, SHE LED US HERE SO MANY YEARS AGO ♪
♪ WHOA, AND EVERY YEAR OUR FAMILY BLESSINGS GROW ♪
♪ IT'S JUST A LOT, YOU SIMPLY GOT TO KNOW, SO ♪
♪ WELCOME TO FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪ ♪ THE HOME OF THE FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪
♪ WE'RE ON OUR WAY ♪ ♪ WHERE ALL THE PEOPLE ARE FANTASTICAL AND MAGICAL ♪
♪ I'M PART OF FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪ - OH MY GOSH, IT'S THEM!
WHAT ARE THE GIFTS? - I CAN'T REMEMBER ALL THE GIFTS!
ko: 선물이 뭐야? 선물을 다 기억 못 하겠어!

en: - I DON'T KNOW WHO'S WHO? - ALL RIGHT, ALL RIGHT, RELAX.
ko: 누가 누군지 모르겠어. 됐어, 됐어, 진정해.

en: - IS IS PHYSICALLY IMPOSSIBLE TO RELAX. - TELL US EVERYTHING, WHAT ARE YOUR POWERS?
ko: 진정이 안 돼! 다 알려줘, 초능력이 뭐야?

en: - JUST TELL US WHAT EVERYONE CAN DO!
ko: 다들 뭘 할 수 있는지 알려줘!

en: - AND THAT'S WHY COFFEE'S FOR GROWNUPS.
♪ MY TIA PEPA, HER MOOD AFFECTS THE WEATHER ♪
♪ WHEN SHE'S UNHAPPY, WELL, THE TEMPERATURE GETS WEIRD ♪
♪ MY TIO BRUNO, WE DON'T TALK ABOUT BRUNO ♪
♪ THEY SAY HE SAW THE FUTURE, ONE DAY HE DISAPPEARED ♪
♪ OH, AND THAT'S MY MOM JULIETA, HERE'S HER DEAL, WHOA ♪
♪ THE TRUTH IS, SHE CAN HEAL YOU WITH A MEAL, WHOA ♪
♪ HER RECIPES ARE REMEDIES FOR REAL, WHOA ♪ ♪ IF YOU'RE IMPRESSED, IMAGINE HOW I FEEL ♪
MOM! ♪ WELCOME TO THE FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪
♪ THE HOME OF THE FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪ HEY, COMING THROUGH!
♪ I KNOW IT SOUNDS A BIT FANTASTICAL AND MAGICAL ♪ ♪ BUT I'M PART OF THE FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪
♪ TWO GUYS FELL IN LOVE WITH FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪
♪ AND NOW THEY'RE PART OF THE FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪ ♪ SO YEAH, TIO FéLIX MARRIED PEPA ♪
♪ AND MY DAD MARRIED JULIETA ♪ ♪ THAT'S HOW ABUELA BECAME AN ABUELA MADRIGAL ♪ ♪ LET'S GO, LET'S GO ♪
♪ WE SWEAR TO ALWAYS ♪ ♪ HELP THOSE AROUND US ♪ ♪ AND EARN THE MIRACLE ♪
♪ THAT SOMEHOW FOUND US ♪ ♪ THE TOWN KEEPS GROWING ♪ ♪ THE WORLD KEEPS TURNING ♪
♪ BUT WORK AND DEDICATION WILL KEEP THE MIRACLE BURNING ♪
♪ AND EACH NEW GENERATION MUST KEEP THE MIRACLE BURNING ♪
- WAIT, WHO'S A SISTER AND WHO'S A COUSIN? - THERE'S SO MANY PEOPLE! - HOW DO YOU KEEP THEM ALL STRAIGHT?
ko: 잠깐, 누가 자매고 누가 사촌이야? 사람이 너무 많아! 어떻게 구분해?

en: - OKAY, OKAY, OKAY, OKAY. SO MANY KIDS IN OUR HOUSE SO, LET'S TURN THE SOUND UP
ko: 됐어, 됐어. 우리 집에 애가 엄청 많으니까, 볼륨을 올려보자

en: YOU KNOW WHY? I THINK IT'S TIME FOR A GRANDKID ROUND UP.
♪ COUSIN DOLORES CAN HEAR A PIN DROP ♪
♪ CAMILO SHAPE SHIFTS, ANTONIO GETS HIS GIFT TODAY ♪
♪ MY OLDER SISTERS, ISABELA AND LUISA ♪ ♪ ONE STRONG, ONE GRACEFUL ♪
♪ PERFECT IN EVERY WAY ♪ ♪ ISABELA, GROWS A FLOWER, THE TOWN GOES WILD ♪
♪ ISABELA, SHE'S A PERFECT GOLDEN CHILD ♪ ♪ LUISA, LUISA ♪
♪ AND LUISA'S SUPER STRONG ♪ ♪ THE BEAUTY AND THE BRAWN DO NO WRONG ♪
- COMING ABUELA!
♪ THAT'S LIFE IN THE FAMILY MADRIGAL, WHOA ♪
♪ NOW YOU KNOW THE FAMILY MADRIGAL, WHOA ♪
♪ WHERE ALL THE PEOPLE ARE FANTASTICAL AND MAGICAL, WHOA ♪
♪ THAT'S WHO WE ARE IN THE FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪ - ADIOS!
- WELL, WHAT'S YOUR GIFT?
♪ WELL, I GOTTA GO, THE LIFE OF A MADRIGAL, WHOA ♪
♪ BUT NOW YOU ALL KNOW THE FAMILY MADRIGAL, WHOA ♪
♪ I NEVER MEANT THIS TO GET AUTOBIOGRAPHICAL, WHOA ♪ ♪ SO JUST TO REVIEW THE FAMILY MADRIGAL ♪
- BUT WHAT ABOUT MIRABEL? ♪ IT STARTS WITH ABUELA AND THEN TIA PEPA ♪ ♪ SHE HANDLES THE WEATHER ♪
- BUT WHAT ABOUT MIRABEL? ♪ MY MOM JULIETA CAN MAKE YOU FEEL BETTER ♪ ♪ WITH JUST ONE AREPA ♪ BUT WHAT ABOUT MIRABEL?
♪ MY DAD AGUSTIN, WELL HE'S ACCIDENT-PRONE ♪ ♪ BUT HE MEANS WELL ♪ BUT WHAT ABOUT MIRABEL?
♪ HEY, YOU SAID YOU WANNA KNOW WHAT EVERYONE DOES ♪ ♪ I GOT SISTERS AND COUSINS AND ♪ MIRABEL!
♪ MY PRIMO CAMILO WON'T STOP ♪ ♪ UNTIL HE MAKES YOU SMILE TODAY ♪ MIRABEL!
♪ MY COUSIN DOLORES CAN HEAR THIS WHOLE CHORUS A MILE AWAY ♪ - MIRABEL! ♪ LOOK, IT'S MISTER MARIANO ♪
♪ HEY YOU CAN MARRY MY SISTER IF YOU WANNA ♪ ♪ BUT BETWEEN YOU AND ME, SHE'S KIND OF A PRIMA DONNA ♪
♪ YO, I'VE SAID TOO MUCH ♪ ♪ AND THANK YOU BUT I REALLY GOTTA GO ♪ MIRABEL! ♪ MY FAMILY'S AMAZING ♪ MIRABEL!
♪ AND I'M IN MY FAMILY, SO ♪ MIRABEL! ♪ WELL ♪ - MIRABEL!
WHAT ARE YOU DOING?
- THEY WERE JUST ASKING ABOUT THE FAMILY.
- SHE WAS ABOUT TO TELL US ABOUT HER SUPER AWESOME GIFT.
ko: 엄청난 선물에 대해 얘기해 주려고 했어요.

en: - OH, MIRABEL DIDN'T GET ONE.
(ROOSTER CLUCKING)
